title: Podanthum leianthum
taxonomy: Podanthum leianthum is a species of flowering plant in the family Podanthaceae. It is a part of the order Apiales and the subclass Rosidae. The plant is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world, particularly in Asia and Australia. Within the classification, Podanthum leianthum is placed in the kingdom Plantae. Further classification includes the family, order, class, subclass, and kingdom, providing a comprehensive understanding of its taxonomic position.
